user.title: Add Ledvance Light
user.description: Choose how to add your device.

scan.description: Select a discovered device from your network.

credentials.title: Enter Local Key
credentials.description: Device found at {ip} (ID: {device_id}). Enter the local key to connect.

data_description.local_key: Find via TinyTuya wizard or Tuya IoT Platform

manual.title: Manual Device Entry

data_description.ip_address: The local IP address of the device on your network
data_description.device_id: Tuya device ID (find via TinyTuya wizard or Tuya IoT Platform)

error.device_not_found: No device found at this IP address. Check the IP and make sure the device is online.
error.invalid_key: Invalid Device ID or Local Key. Please check your credentials.
error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to the device. Please try again.
error.no_devices_found: No Tuya devices found on your network. Try manual entry instead.
